when_to_use: Conversational commerce chatbot for Japanese enterprise brands
AI chat flow converting product inquiries into transactions
LINE and messaging-channel chatbot for 480+ enterprise clients
Customer journey automation from discovery to purchase via chat
AI-powered chat commerce replacing static forms in Japan

pros: Deep Japanese market and language support
Handles line and chat channels natively
cons: Feature overlap with generic CX AI vendors
review.verdict: The default conversational commerce choice in Japan, largely unknown and unnecessary elsewhere.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises running conversational commerce across LINE, chat, and web.
review.not_for: Non-Japanese brands where global CX AI vendors already have stronger fit.
